criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Presence and quality of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, voice assistants, and music discovery tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: Total number of songs and albums available in the app's library.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, design, and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert reviews

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability across different platforms such as iOS, Android, Web, etc.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Social Features
criteria.description: Features that allow users to share music, connect with friends, and engage with the community.

criteria.name: Offline Access
criteria.description: Ability to download music for offline listening.

criteria.name: Integration with Other Services
criteria.description: Integration with other apps and services like smart speakers, wearables, and social media.
